# See Frequencies With an FFT

## Lesson Goal

Inspect a signal in the frequency domain.

## What to Notice

This introduces the idea that pitch detection often starts by asking where energy is concentrated.

## Work With the Notebook

- [Open the notebook source](https://github.com/buildLittleWorlds/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/blob/main/notebooks/07_spectrum_fft/notebook.py)
- [Run the browser notebook](https://buildlittleworlds.github.io/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/notebooks/07_spectrum_fft/)

Run locally:

```bash
uv run marimo edit notebooks/07_spectrum_fft/notebook.py
```

## Feedback Lens

Check whether the student can identify fundamental and harmonic peaks.

## Instructor Notes

Use this lesson as a small checkpoint. Before asking students to add features,
ask them to name the input, the transformation, the output, and the current
limitation. That habit will matter more in later transcription notebooks than
any one line of code.
